basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 announced for 4 contractual posts. Candidates with M.Sc. or Integrated Masters in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Environmental Science with 2 years research experience can apply online through neeri.res.in before 27 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / Integrated Masters in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Environmental Science from a recognized University AND 02 years experience in Research and Development and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
